channel.title: Perimenopause Symptoms & Signs — Hush
channel.description: Perimenopause Symptoms & Signs — hormone-free menopause self-care pins from Hush.

item.title: Is It Perimenopause, or Just Stress?
item.description: Is it perimenopause or stress? If you're second-guessing every mood swing and missed hour of sleep, you're not alone. Hormone-free menopause self care for midlife days that ask a lot. #perimenopause #menopausesymptoms #midlifewomen #hormonefree
